code:
import random
from System.Collections.Generic import List
doc = Rhino.RhinoDoc.ActiveDoc
ids = []
for i in range(10):
    p = Rhino.Geometry.Point3d(random.random() * 1000, random.random() * 1000, 0)
    ids.append(doc.Objects.AddPoint(p))
glist = List[System.Guid]()
for g in ids:
    glist.Add(g)
group_index = doc.Groups.Add(glist)
doc.Views.Redraw()
return {"group_index": group_index, "point_count": len(ids), "ids": [str(g) for g in ids]}
